brand.name: SPET
brand.description: Premium multi-tenant SaaS for hospitality operations.

primary.usage: Primary actions, active states, key data highlights

surfaces.card: bg-card border border-border/40 rounded-lg shadow-sm hover:border-primary/50 transition-colors duration-200

inputs.base: bg-white/5 border-white/10 focus:border-primary focus:ring-1 focus:ring-primary text-white placeholder:text-neutral-500

universal_guidelines: FORCE DARK MODE: Update CSS variables in index.css to make dark mode values the default :root values.
NO PURPLE: Replace all instances of Hue 253 with Hue 216 (Electric Blue).
NO TEAL: Avoid teal/cyan unless strictly required for specific data visualization (use Blue or White/Grey instead).
LINEAR STYLE: Use 1px borders with low opacity (10-15%) instead of heavy shadows for separation.
DATA DENSITY: In dashboards (Manager, Owner), keep spacing tight (p-2, gap-2) but consistent. In Marketing/Login, use generous spacing (p-8).
GLASS: Use 'backdrop-blur-xl' for sticky headers and overlays.
INTERACTION: Add 'transition-all duration-200' to all interactive elements. Hover states must be clear.
DO NOT CHANGE ROUTING: Keep all existing routes and logic exactly as is.

instructions_to_main_agent.step_1: Update /app/frontend/src/index.css: Replace HSL variables. Set dark mode HSLs as the default in :root. Remove the light mode block or swap it so light mode is opt-in (if kept).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_2: Update /app/frontend/tailwind.config.js: Ensure 'border-border' and 'bg-background' map correctly. Adjust 'borderRadius' theme to match the Linear look (slightly sharper).
instructions_to_main_agent.step_3: Refine /app/frontend/src/App.js: Ensure the outer container has 'min-h-screen bg-background text-foreground' to apply the dark theme globally.
instructions_to_main_agent.step_4: Polish Components: Go through Shadcn components in /components/ui and ensure they use the new variables (e.g. Card should have 'border-border/40').
instructions_to_main_agent.step_5: Polish Pages: Apply 'Bento Grid' layouts to Dashboard pages. Apply 'Glass' effects to Headers.
